name: Sandoz Group AG
description: Sandoz Group AG is a global leader in generic and biosimilar medicines, headquartered in Basel, Switzerland. With a rich history dating back to 1886, the company focuses on pioneering access to high-quality, affordable healthcare for patients worldwide. Sandoz develops, manufactures, and markets a broad portfolio of generic pharmaceuticals and biosimilars, alongside active pharmaceutical ingredients. Following its spin-off from Novartis in 2023, Sandoz operates as an independent entity, dedicated to addressing unmet medical needs and improving patient outcomes through its extensive expertise in complex medicine development and global distribution networks.
